hero.lede: A high-end guest house that blends ultra-contemporary comfort with Tunisian hospitality, in the heart of the medina.
maison.p1: An hour from Tunis, Dar Sabri is a high-end guest house with a wholly original concept. Four unique suites, refined interiors, an infinity pool and a rooftop hammam. Here, time slows down.
maison.p2: Linger on the sun terrace, savour the host's table, wander through the medina and meet the artisans of Nabeul.
suites.title: Four suites, four stories
suite.or.name: Gold Suite
suite.or.short: A traditional Tunisian suite, long and flowing, bathed in light and crafted from noble materials.
suite.or.long: On the ground floor, the Gold Suite unfolds as a sequence of spaces bathed in natural light. Noble materials and local craftsmanship converse with resolutely contemporary comfort, for a timeless escape.
suite.argent.name: Silver Suite
suite.argent.short: Character and light, a living suite where Tunisian art and craftsmanship echo one another.
suite.argent.long: Vibrant and luminous, the Silver Suite celebrates Tunisian art and craftsmanship. Rich colours and carefully sourced pieces compose a joyful, refined atmosphere, just steps from the medina.
suite.ymen.name: Ymen Suite
suite.ymen.short: Upstairs, signed by the Tunisian painter Ymen Berhouma. For lovers of art.
suite.ymen.long: Upstairs, the Ymen Suite is a living work of art in its own right. Tunisian painter Ymen Berhouma has lent her name and her world to this exceptional suite, designed for lovers of contemporary art.
suite.ebene.name: Ebony Suite
suite.ebene.short: The contrast of black and white, a suite with bold character and a resolutely contemporary spirit.
suite.ebene.long: All in contrasts, the Ebony Suite plays black against white with clean lines and assured graphic art. A suite of strong character, for lovers of design and contemporary moods.
feature.p: As the first veils of evening fall over Nabeul, the riad glows with an irresistibly romantic mood. It is the perfect moment for a host's table beneath the stars.
book.title: Book direct, in English
book.sub: Choose your dates and book without ever leaving Dar Sabri. No detours, no commission.
book.note: Instant confirmation · Best rate guaranteed when booking direct · Secure payment
gallery.title: Living Dar Sabri
reviews.title: An address you won't forget
reviews.r1: A true haven of peace in the heart of the medina. The welcome and the décor are of rare refinement.
reviews.r2: The rooftop pool at sunset, unforgettable. You truly feel right at home.
reviews.r3: Every suite is a work of art. A timeless stay and exceptional hospitality.
footer.desc: A high-end guest house in the heart of the Nabeul medina. Four suites, an infinity pool, a hammam and a host's table.
book.confirmed_p: Thank you so much. We will send your confirmation by email in just a few moments.
